<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/analysis-runs/{analysis-run}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve an AnalysisRun resource from a project's namespace.
